requirement_topic.en: Bosnia Market Authorization and CE-Aligned Technical Documentation
requirement_topic.zh: 波斯尼亚市场准入与CE对齐技术文件
requirement_topic.zht: 波斯尼亞市場准入與CE對齊技術文件

summary.en: Bosnia-facing EV chargers should be prepared with market-facing technical documentation and declarations for applicable EU-aligned product legislation and operator requirements. IEC 61851-1:2017 is the core conductive charging safety standard for EV supply equipment and is used to define electrical safety, EVSE-to-vehicle interface conditions, and operational states within project-ready technical packs.
summary.zh: 面向波斯尼亚的电动汽车充电设备，应为适用的欧盟协调产品法规与运营要求准备市场化技术文件和符合性声明。IEC 61851-1:2017是传导式充电设备的核心安全标准，用于定义电气安全、EVSE与车辆接口条件及项目就绪技术包中的运行状态。
summary.zht: 面向波斯尼亞的電動汽車充電設備，應為適用的歐盟協調產品法規與營運要求準備市場化技術文件和符合性聲明。IEC 61851-1:2017是傳導式充電設備的核心安全標準，用於定義電氣安全、EVSE與車輛介面條件及專案就緒技術包中的運作狀態。

standards_or_laws: CE marking for applicable EU-aligned product legislation
BAS and project-level EN/IEC electrical acceptance references

summary.en: China files commonly use GB/T 18487.1 and GB/T 20234 references for conductive charging requirements. These are useful for clause mapping but do not replace Bosnia-facing CE-aligned technical files, declarations, local manual language, or market-route approvals.
summary.zh: 中国资料通常使用GB/T 18487.1和GB/T 20234等参数处理传导充电要求。这些文件可用于条款映射，但不能替代波斯尼亚面向市场的CE对齐技术文件、符合性声明、当地语言说明和市场路径批准。
summary.zht: 中國資料通常使用GB/T 18487.1和GB/T 20234等參數處理傳導充電要求。這些文件可用於條款映射，但不能替代波斯尼亞面向市場的CE對齊技術文件、符合性聲明、當地語言說明和市場路徑批准。

gap.en: The gap is that technical files should be converted to Bosnia-facing structure: applicable directives, harmonized or adopted standard list, test reports, critical component certificates, risk analysis, local language manuals and warnings, declaration of conformity, label artwork, and change-control evidence.
gap.zh: 差距在于技术文件必须转换为波斯尼亚面向结构，包括适用法规映射、协调/采标标准清单、测试报告、关键部件证书、风险分析、当地语言说明与警示、符合性声明、标签图稿与变更控制证据。
gap.zht: 差距在於技術文件必須轉換為波斯尼亞面向結構，包括適用法規映射、協調/採標標準清單、測試報告、關鍵部件證書、風險分析、當地語言說明與警示、符合性聲明、標籤圖稿與變更控制證據。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the charger falls under applicable CE-aligned product law and project procurement requires Bosnia-facing technical documentation
mandatory_status.cn: China GB/T baseline does not constitute Bosnia market authorization without Bosnia conversion

source.publisher: Institute for Standardization of Bosnia and Herzegovina (BAS)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC / EN evidence as part of a Bosnia-ready CE technical-file route, not as a standalone market approval. Confirm the exact market route and local approval model before claiming readiness.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将IEC/EN证据作为波斯尼亚CE化技术文件路径的一部分，而非单独的市场批准。宣称就绪前应确认确切市场路径和当地批准模型。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將IEC/EN證據作為波斯尼亞CE化技術文件路徑的一部分，而非單獨的市場批准。宣稱就緒前應確認確切市場路徑和當地批准模型。
